title: senecio gibbosus subsp. cineraria
intro: Senecio gibbosus subsp. cineraria, also known as Grey Groundsel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Grey Groundsel include its potential to help with urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, and to alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Grey Groundsel can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity when consumed in large quantities.
